name: Poppy Seed Snack Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 package White cake mix without pudding
1 package Instant coconut cream pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the cake and pudding mixes.
2. Add eggs, hot water, and vegetable oil to the dry ingredients.
3. Beat for 2 minutes until well combined.
4. Fold in the poppy seeds.
5. Pour the batter into two greased and floured loaf pans.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 35 - 40 minutes or until golden brown.
Recipe by: Sue Klapper Preparation Time: 0:40
From: Taste of Home Magazine
